chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr.Misc.A.No.898 of 2024 Muhammad Arif-ur-Rehman............................Applicant Vs. Adnan & others............................................Respondent 1. For orders on office objection at “A” 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.1161 of 2024 30.10.2024 Mr. Muhammad Saleem Ansari, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Mustafa Lakhani, Advocate for Respondent No.1. Ms. Rahat Ehsan, Addl. P.G. ----------- O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant has challenged an order dated 21.08.2024, passed by the learned XIth Addl.Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Karachi East on an application filed by respondent No.1 under section 22-A & 22-B Cr..P.C. for registration of FIR against the applicant under section 489-F PPC. 2. Learned counsel in defence has argued that the cheques were not issued to respondent No.1; cheques have been manipulated and tampered by him; there is no evidence suggesting issuance of cheques by the applicant to respondent No.1. However, his arguments have been opposed by learned counsel for respondent No.1 and learned Addl.P.G. 3. I have heard the arguments and perused the material available on the record. No case for indulgence is made out. The case is based on documentary evidence and the points raised by learned counsel for the applicant are factual that need to be investigated and cannot be determined at this stage, therefore, this application is dismissed alongwith listed applications. 4. The bail application is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Imran
